flows.title: Customer registers a new account
flows.trigger: Customer clicks 'Register' on the login page
steps: Customer fills registration form (name, email, password, phone)
System validates inputs and checks for existing email
System creates account with 'unverified' status
System sends verification email with OTP link via Mailgun
Customer clicks verification link in email
System marks account as verified
System creates session and redirects to account page
flows.outcome: Customer has a verified account and is logged in

flows.title: Customer logs in to their account
steps: Customer enters email and password
System validates credentials against stored hash
System creates secure HTTP-only session cookie
System redirects to previously requested page or homepage
flows.outcome: Customer is authenticated and can access protected features

flows.title: Customer browses and searches products
flows.trigger: Customer navigates to storefront homepage or search
steps: Customer views homepage with featured products and banners
Customer browses product categories from navigation
Customer uses search bar to find specific products
Customer applies filters (category, brand, price range)
Customer views product detail page with images and variants
flows.outcome: Customer finds products they want to purchase

flows.title: Customer adds items to cart
flows.trigger: Customer clicks 'Add to Cart' on product page
steps: Customer selects product variant (size, color) if applicable
Customer sets quantity
System checks product availability flag
System adds item to cart (creates cart if first item)
Cart totals update in real-time
Cart persists to database for logged-in users
flows.outcome: Item is in customer's cart, ready for checkout

flows.title: Guest customer completes checkout with auto-registration
steps: Customer reviews cart items and totals
Customer enters contact information (name, email, phone)
Customer enters shipping address with Indonesia-specific fields
Customer reviews order summary with shipping cost
Customer clicks 'Pay with Midtrans'
Midtrans Snap popup opens with payment options
Customer completes payment (card, VA, e-wallet, QRIS)
Midtrans sends webhook confirmation to server
System auto-creates customer account using provided details
Order status updates to 'paid' and links to new customer account
Customer sees order confirmation page
System sends order confirmation email via Mailgun with account details
flows.outcome: Order is placed, customer has new account created automatically

flows.title: Customer tracks order status
steps: Customer logs into account
Customer navigates to 'My Orders'
Customer sees list of all orders with status badges
Customer clicks on specific order for details
Customer views order items, shipping address, payment info, and status timeline
flows.outcome: Customer knows the current status of their order

flows.title: Admin manages products
flows.trigger: Admin navigates to Products section in dashboard
steps: Admin logs into admin dashboard
Admin views product list with status indicators
Admin clicks 'Add Product' or edits existing product
Admin fills product form (name, description, price, category, brand)
Admin uploads product images to Vercel Blob
Admin configures variants (size, color, individual pricing)
Admin sets product availability flag (available/unavailable)
Admin sets product as active/inactive
System saves product to database
Storefront product pages regenerate (ISR)
flows.outcome: Product is created or updated in catalog

flows.title: Admin processes an order
flows.trigger: Admin views new order in order management
steps: Admin logs into admin dashboard
Admin views order list filtered by 'paid' status
Admin clicks on order to view details
Admin verifies items and shipping address
Admin updates order status to 'processing'
Admin prepares shipment
Admin enters tracking number and updates status to 'shipped'
System sends shipping notification email via Mailgun to customer

flows.title: Admin views sales dashboard
flows.trigger: Admin logs into admin dashboard homepage
steps: Admin sees stats cards (total sales, orders, customers, revenue)
Admin views revenue chart by time period
Admin sees top-selling products list
Admin can filter date range for analytics
flows.outcome: Admin has visibility into store performance

flows.title: Admin manages homepage banners
steps: Admin views current banners with preview images
Admin adds new banner (image, link, display order)
Admin edits or deletes existing banners
Admin sets banner active/inactive status
Storefront homepage updates with new banner configuration

flows.title: Customer resets forgotten password
flows.trigger: Customer clicks 'Forgot Password' on login page
steps: Customer enters registered email address
System generates OTP and sends via Mailgun
Customer enters OTP from email
System verifies OTP is valid and not expired
Customer sets new password
System hashes and stores new password
System invalidates OTP and redirects to login
flows.outcome: Customer can log in with new password
